source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 教育部开通高校学生资助热线
topics.official_english: Education, health fees among key concerns
topics.why_hot: Education policy directly affects millions of students and families, especially financial support for higher education.
topics.share_angle: Explain how the hotline works and what it means for students from low-income backgrounds.

topics.chinese_topic: C罗点球破门！葡萄牙2-1克罗地亚
topics.why_hot: World Cup match with dramatic moments and star player Ronaldo scoring his first knockout goal.
topics.share_angle: Highlight the emotional rollercoaster and significance of Ronaldo's goal.

topics.why_hot: Chinese table tennis star unexpectedly eliminated, sparking discussion about national team performance.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the upset and its implications for Chinese table tennis.

topics.chinese_topic: 委内瑞拉震区几乎所有官员遇难
topics.why_hot: Major natural disaster with tragic loss of local leadership, raising questions about governance and recovery.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the challenges of disaster response when local officials are wiped out.

topics.chinese_topic: 女子自费装“电梯”给全楼用遭抵制
topics.why_hot: Community conflict over altruistic act highlights tensions in urban shared spaces.
topics.share_angle: Explore the social dynamics and legal aspects of private installations in public housing.

topics.chinese_topic: 中央巡查组：再不治理迟早出大事
topics.why_hot: Central inspection team's warning about environmental or safety issues signals high-level concern.
topics.share_angle: Explain the role of central inspections and what this warning means for local governance.

topics.chinese_topic: 爸爸带弱视儿子徒步2年改善视力
topics.why_hot: Inspiring story of parental dedication and alternative therapy for vision improvement.
topics.share_angle: Highlight the science behind outdoor activity and vision health, and the emotional bond.

topics.chinese_topic: 上海程序员拍下“银河落九天”
topics.why_hot: Stunning photo of Milky Way over Shanghai combines technology, nature, and urban life.
topics.share_angle: Discuss how light pollution affects stargazing and the photographer's technique.
